components.name: Terminology
components.usage: Aligned conceptual terms about the problem space with non-obvious meanings. Align your response with this terminology to ensure interpretive alignment with the user.

components.name: Principles
components.usage: Beliefs, values, and guidelines that shape how we think and decide. Use these to guide reasoning and apply when making recommendations or tradeoffs.

components.name: Anti-patterns
components.usage: Approaches to avoid e.g. wrong framings, pitfalls, and lessons learned. Check against these before proposing ideas or solutions.

components.name: Insights
components.usage: Validated discoveries about the problem space. Treat these as established facts when reasoning about the project and avoid relitigating.

components.name: Frameworks
components.usage: Index of available frameworks. When tackling a relevant problem type, read the full framework at `.worldview/frameworks/[framework-name].md`.
